SafeReprzurepr.Repr that limits the resulting size of repr() and includes
    information on exceptions raised during the call.N)

	maxstringr

object
strr
__classcell__r
Return a pretty printed string for the given object.
    Failing __repr__ functions of user instances will be represented
    with a short exception info.
    N)
pprint
pformat
	Exceptionr
safeformatB
Return a size-limited safe repr-string for the given object.
    Failing __repr__ functions of user instances will be represented
    with a short exception info and 'saferepr' generally takes
    care to never raise exceptions itself.
    This function is a wrapper around the Repr/reprlib functionality of the
    standard 2.6 lib.
    )
safereprN
AlwaysDispatchingPrettyPrinterz;PrettyPrinter that always dispatches (regardless of width).N)
stream

	allowance

Z	_dispatch

objidr%
z&AlwaysDispatchingPrettyPrinter._format)
compact)
width
depthrB

reprlib
typingr
